Overall,  at  the  tested  concentrations  (EC50),  all  combinations  of
CBGA  NPs  with  terpene-loaded  NPs  showed  significantly  higher  fluo-
rescence  intensity  compared  to  individual  NPs  (p  < 0.05;  Fig.  8K).
Furthermore, the experimental relative fluorescence intensities (RFI) of
CBGA/terpene  combinations  were  generally  higher  than  calculated
values, with statistically significant differences observed for CBGA/NL
and CBGA/CPh combinational nanoformulations (p < 0.05; Fig. 8L).

batch  variability  (<10  %)  in  size  and  zeta  potential.  Consistent  drug
loading and encapsulation efficiencies were confirmed using HPLC and
